text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One important use is text understanding, where machines analyze written words to find meaning. NLP also powers translation tools, such as online services that convert text between languages. Another application is sentiment analysis, which determines if a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral feelings. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have conversations with users, answering questions or providing help in a natural way. These technologies make everyday tasks much easier.
